tasks.label: FL: build
tasks.detail: One-shot extension + webview build. Used by 'FL Tools (build)' launch.

tasks.label: FL: dev
tasks.detail: Watch host (esbuild) + webview (vite build --watch). On webview change the extension host fs-watches dist/webview and nudges open panels to reload (PWA-style). On extension code change, Cmd+R the Extension Development Host to pick up.

background.//: Match either esbuild's 'watching extension host' OR Vite's 'built in' — whichever comes first signals ready. We rely on vite.config.ts's `emptyOutDir: !isWatchMode` so launching before vite finishes is safe (previous build's chunks stay in dist/webview/ and the dev/reload path nudges the panel once the new build lands). Without the OR-pattern the launch hangs whenever one of the two output streams is buffered/styled in a way the regex doesn't catch.
